name: arsenal
description: A collection of AI skills, commands, and plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: tech-lead
plugins.description: Tech leads: tech spec writing, feature planning, and technical documentation

plugins.name: git-commands
plugins.description: Custom git workflow commands with conventional commits

plugins.name: reddit-scanner
plugins.description: Scan Reddit subreddits for pain points, tool complaints, and app opportunities. Find real product ideas from niche communities using the reddit-scanner CLI with Bubble Tea TUI.

plugins.name: react-native-mobile
plugins.description: Complete React Native + Expo mobile development: app architecture, UI patterns, state management, design systems, animations, and DevOps (EAS Build, Submit, Update, Workflows)
